task_completion.description: Open the Sygic GPS Navigation app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic GPS Navigation app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Access the offline map management section
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen for managing offline maps is visible, showing a list of continents or regions.

task_completion.description: Select or expand the North America region
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'North America' region is selected or expanded, showing countries like the United States.

task_completion.description: Select or expand the United States
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'United States' is selected or expanded, showing a list of US states.

task_completion.description: Initiate the download for the Hawaii map
task_completion.visual_evidence: The download for 'Hawaii' is initiated, indicated by a progress bar, a pause button, or a downloading status next to it.

task_completion.description: Verify the Hawaii map is fully downloaded
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Hawaii' map is shown as successfully downloaded, indicated by a checkmark, a trash/delete icon, or the absence of a download button next to it.

integrity.description: The agent used the app's GUI to navigate and download the map
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show step-by-step navigation through the app's menus rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Sygic GPS Navigation app
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to the Sygic app (com.sygic.aura), not a web browser, text editor, or generic file downloader.

integrity.description: The agent downloaded the map through the app instead of just opening a file manager
integrity.visual_evidence: The download process is shown within the Sygic app, rather than just displaying the /sdcard/Android/data/com.sygic.aura/files/Maps directory in a file manager.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires downloading the offline map for Hawaii in the Sygic GPS Navigation app (com.sygic.aura). The map is located in the app's map management section under the hierarchy: North America > United States > Hawaii. The downloaded map files are stored in /sdcard/Android/data/com.sygic.aura/files/Maps.
